name: How is fault determined in work injury cases?

mainEntity.name: How is fault determined in work injury cases?

acceptedAnswer.text: No-fault system; coverage based on work connection, not blame.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers' comp is no-fault—you don't prove employer negligence for benefits.[1][5] Fault matters only for third-party suits.[1] Key factors: AOE/COE test for coverage; employer can't deny for your partial fault usually.[1] Practical guidance: Focus on reporting and medical compliance, not blame; sue third parties separately if negligent. This system ensures quick aid.

description: No-fault system; coverage based on work connection, not blame.[1]
